name: background-editor
description: Comprehensive background management utility supporting solid colors, gradients, images, and videos with overlay support, normal/hover states, and live preview. Integrates with color picker, gradient creator, and media library.
author: Spwig

1.0.5: Replaced custom media browse modal with platform media library widget for image and video selection
1.0.4: Replaced native browser alert() with AdminModal for consistent admin UI
